case_title: RELATED MANAGEMENT COMPANY VS. SARA MILLER et al

docket_entries.description: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, SARA MILLER, ANDRE MILLER, CAMILLE KING, KENNETH KING, NAOMI HEARING SET FOR SEP-11-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301
MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELATED MANAGEMENT COMPANY

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS SARA MILLER, ANDRE MILLER, CAMILLE MILLER, KENNETH KING AND NAOMI KING'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 430.10 (E) WITH FIVE DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO STATE A BASIS ON WHICH NOTICE OF THE GRIEVANCE PROCEDURE NEED NOT BE GIVEN. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANTS SARA MILLER, ANDRE MILLER, CAMILLE MILLER, KENNETH KING, AND NAOMI KING'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. DEFENDANTS ARGUE THAT IF PLAINTIFF CONTENDS THAT THE GRIEVANCE AND APPEAL PROCEDURE DOES NOT APPLY TO EVICTIONS BASED UPON A THREAT TO THE HEALTH OR SAFETY OF OTHER RESIDENTS, THEN A STATEMENT TO THAT EFFECT SHOULD HAVE BEEN INCLUDED IN THE NOTICE. THERE IS NO BASIS OR AUTHORITY FOR SUCH A REQUIREMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART, REPORTER: SUSAN CROZIER, CSR # 4761 =301/JKS/PM
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-22-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT MILLER, SARA MILLER, ANDRE MILLER, CAMILLE KING, KENNETH KING, NAOMI
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
